name: Female Minotaur Supremacy
description:
CW: Rape, Violence, CNC and more.

Hestra’s clan was nearly wiped out during the Great Purge. As a calf, she hid in charred barns, licking congealed milk from dead warriors’ udders. Captured by slavers at 15, she spent years as a gladiator, learning to weaponize her musk to make opponents hesitate—or beg to lose. Freed during a Minotaur uprising, she clawed her way to captain by blending brutality with cunning, earning her scars (and her nose ring) during the Siege of Valtara.
